title: Dubstep Guns
description: Wield explosive guns that fire musical waves. Features custom dubstep tracks, dynamic particles, and rhythm-based destruction.
body:
# SaintsPack: Dubstep Guns

Wield explosive guns that fire musical waves. Features custom dubstep tracks, dynamic particles, and rhythm-based destruction.

## Features
*   **Musical Weaponry**: Guns that play synchronized dubstep tracks while firing.
*   **Visual Effects**: Dynamic particles, smooth rainbow HUD, and custom 3D models.
*   **Rhythm Combat**: Explosive impacts and effects synced to the beat of the music.
*   **Modern Port**: Fully updated for Minecraft 1.20.1.

## Features
*   **Musical Weaponry**: Guns that play synchronized dubstep tracks while firing.
*   **Visual Effects**: Dynamic particles, smooth rainbow HUD, and custom 3D models.
*   **Rhythm Combat**: Explosive impacts and effects synced to the beat of the music.
*   **Modern Port**: Fully updated for Minecraft 1.20.1.

## Credits
*   **Original Mod Author**: Saint (Creator of the original Dubstep Gun Mod)
*   **Ported by**: wthieves
*   Based on the original [Dubstep Gun Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dubstep-gun-mod).
